# cloud_other corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Oracle Cloud OCIDs ===
# expect: Oracle Cloud Tenancy OCID
# expect: Oracle Cloud User OCID
# expect: Oracle Cloud Compartment OCID
# expect: Oracle Cloud Vault/Secret OCID
ocid1.tenancy.oc1..aaaaaaaaexampleexampleexampleexample
ocid1.user.oc1..aaaaaaaaexampleexampleexampleexample
ocid1.compartment.oc1..aaaaaaaaexampleexampleexampleexample
ocid1.secret.oc1.iad.amaaaaaaexampleexampleexample

# === Oracle Cloud endpoints ===
# expect: Oracle Cloud Object Storage Endpoint
objectstorage.us-ashburn-1.oraclecloud.com

# === Alibaba Cloud ===
# expect: Alibaba RAM AccessKey ID
# expect: Alibaba OSS Signed URL
LTAI5tABCDEFGhijkLMnopq
https://bucket.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/file.txt?OSSAccessKeyId=LTAI5tExampleKey&Signature=abc123def456&Expires=1700000000

# === Tencent Cloud ===
# expect: Tencent Cloud SecretId
# expect: Tencent COS Signed URL
AKIDz8krbsJ5yKBZQpn74WFkmLPx3EXAMPLE
https://b.cos.ap-guangzhou.myqcloud.com/k?q-ak=AKIDexamplekey0&q-signature=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567

# === DigitalOcean ===
# expect: DigitalOcean OAuth Refresh Token
# expect: DigitalOcean OAuth Access Token
# expect: DigitalOcean Spaces Access Key
# expect: DigitalOcean Spaces Endpoint
dor_v1_aabbccdd00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00112233445566778899aabb
doo_v1_aabbccdd00112233445566778899aabbccddeeff00112233445566778899aabb
DO00ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP
nyc3.digitaloceanspaces.com

# === Linode ===
# expect: Linode Object Storage Endpoint
us-east-1.linodeobjects.com

# === Scaleway ===
# expect: Scaleway Access Key
SCWABCDEFGH123456789

# === Exoscale ===
# expect: Exoscale API Key
EXOabcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Fly.io ===
# expect: Fly.io API Token (fo1)
# expect: Fly.io API Token (macaroon)
fo1_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF
FlyV1 fm2_lJPECAABCDEFexampletoken_payload-data

# === Render ===
# expect: Render API Key
rnd_aBc123def456ghi789jkl0

# === Heroku ===
# expect: Heroku API Key (HRKU)
HRKU-aBc123def456ghi789jkl0mn

# === Northflank ===
# expect: Northflank API Token
nf_abcdefghij0123456789abcdefghij0123456789xyz

# === Snowflake ===
# expect: Snowflake Account Endpoint
xy12345.us-east-1.snowflakecomputing.com

# === Databricks ===
# expect: Databricks PAT
dapiabcdef0123456789abcdef0123456701

# === PlanetScale ===
# expect: PlanetScale Service Token
# expect: PlanetScale OAuth Token
pscale_tkn_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCD
pscale_oauth_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123

# === Cloudflare R2 ===
# expect: Cloudflare R2 S3 Endpoint
abcdef0123456789.r2.cloudflarestorage.com

# === Vercel / DigitalOcean GenAI (Block 3a) ===
# expect: Vercel Access Token
# expect: DigitalOcean GenAI Key
vcp_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
cl_BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB
sk-do-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
